'''''Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition''''' was a four-issue series of comic adapting the Special Edition release of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and was published by [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] in 1997 to coincide with the film's rerelease. The four covers make up a collage of characters and settings from ''A New Hope''.
